metadata.description: 12x12 mid-scale testbed (144 nodes, 1..144). Main diagonal corridor n1->n144 = geometric shortest but all-4-phase signals + local-slow roads (signal trap). Arterial rows/cols {0,6,11} = longer detour but fast + sparse signals. Signals sampled per T-DATA SPAT logic (TRA_LIGHT 0/3/4). Goal: shortest picks the diagonal trap, signal-aware models pick the arterial detour.
